project.name: trainersource-app
project.description: Next.js application for Trainer Source with Telegram Mini Apps and BigCommerce integration

layers.name: API Routes
layers.description: Next.js API route handlers for authentication, code generation, commission tracking, webhooks, and integration endpoints

layers.name: Frontend Pages
layers.description: Next.js pages and layouts for admin, trainer, and customer-facing flows including account management, onboarding, and affiliate pages

layers.name: Shared Libraries
layers.description: Core utility libraries for authentication, database access, BigCommerce integration, commission calculations, and business logic

layers.name: React Components
layers.description: Reusable UI components for admin dashboards, trainer interfaces, forms, and landing page layouts

layers.name: Telegram Mini Apps
layers.description: Mini app routes and components for partner calculator, reorder, earnings tracking, and toolkit integration

layers.name: Database & Schema
layers.description: Supabase PostgreSQL schema including tables for admins, trainers, access codes, orders, and commission tracking with RLS policies

layers.name: Authentication & Security
layers.description: Authentication flows for Telegram WebApp, BigCommerce SSO, and role-based access control

layers.name: Configuration & Build
layers.description: Next.js configuration, middleware, environment setup, and project build configuration

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the project structure and entry points to understand the application organization

tour.title: Application Architecture
tour.description: Understand the three main domains: API routes, frontend pages, and mini apps, plus how middleware orchestrates requests

tour.title: Authentication & Security
tour.description: Learn how the app handles authentication with BigCommerce SSO, Telegram WebApp verification, and role-based access control

tour.title: Telegram Mini Apps
tour.description: Explore the Telegram integration with reorder and calculator flows, including partner earnings tracking

tour.title: BigCommerce Integration
tour.description: Understand order management, customer linking, product catalog access, and storefront webhook handling

tour.title: Commission System
tour.description: Learn about commission calculation, tracking, payout processing, and the relationship with database tables

tour.title: Admin & Trainer Dashboards
tour.description: Explore the admin interface for system management and trainer self-service dashboard for code/commission management

tour.title: Database & Data Model
tour.description: Understanding the Supabase schema, row-level security policies, and core data relationships between users, codes, and commissions
